---
title: agenticlr
status: under_review
associated_projects: []
collaborators:
- julianprester
- rm
- rl
- gp
project_resources: []
project_history:
- date: 2026-03-11
  event: started
- date: 2026-06-17
  event: submission
project_id: agenticlr
page_type: project
---

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
This page is auto-generated. The authoritative project metadata is stored in
[`data/projects.yml`](https://github.com/fs-ise/handbook/tree/main/data/projects.yml){target=_blank}.
:::

Field | Value
---|---
Acronym | `agenticlr`
Team | julianprester, rm, rl, gp
Status | `under_review`

## Resources
—


## History
- **2026-03-11** — started
- **2026-06-17** — submission
